name: say-it-right
title: Say It Right
description: Analyze selected English text for stress, intonation, rhythm; hear a model reading.
author: xianwei_zhang

commands.name: analyze-selection
commands.title: Analyze Selection
commands.subtitle: Say It Right
commands.description: Analyze the selected English text for stress, intonation, and rhythm.

commands.name: practice-sentence
commands.title: Practice a Sentence
commands.subtitle: Say It Right
commands.description: Type or paste an English sentence to see how to say it.

commands.name: translate-selection
commands.title: Translate Selection
commands.subtitle: Say It Right
commands.description: Translate selected or pasted text with the configured provider.

preferences.name: defaultAnalysisProvider
preferences.title: Analysis Provider
preferences.description: Preferred provider when multiple analysis keys are set. If only one analysis key is filled, that provider is used automatically.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI API Key
preferences.description: Used for OpenAI analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: openaiAnalysisModel
preferences.title: OpenAI Analysis Model
preferences.description: OpenAI model used for pronunciation analysis.

preferences.name: openaiTtsModel
preferences.title: OpenAI TTS Model
preferences.description: OpenAI model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: openaiTtsVoice
preferences.title: OpenAI TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice for OpenAI TTS.

preferences.name: qwenApiKey
preferences.title: DashScope API Key
preferences.description: Used only for Qwen-TTS. Qwen analysis uses the Token Plan key below.

preferences.name: qwenRegion
preferences.title: Qwen-TTS Region
preferences.description: DashScope TTS region (affects Qwen-TTS base URL).

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Qwen Analysis Model
preferences.description: Qwen chat model used for analysis.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisBaseURL
preferences.title: Qwen Analysis Base URL
preferences.description: Qwen Token Plan base URL for analysis. Default is Anthropic-compatible; OpenAI-compatible /compatible-mode/v1 is also supported. TTS uses DashScope separately.

preferences.name: qwenAnalysisApiKey
preferences.title: Qwen Token Plan API Key
preferences.description: Used only for Qwen analysis. Does not affect Qwen-TTS.

preferences.name: qwenTtsModel
preferences.title: Qwen TTS Model
preferences.description: Qwen TTS model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: qwenTtsVoice
preferences.title: Qwen TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice for Qwen TTS (all support English).

preferences.name: minimaxApiKey
preferences.title: MiniMax API Key
preferences.description: Used for MiniMax analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: minimaxBaseURL
preferences.title: MiniMax Analysis Base URL
preferences.description: MiniMax Token Plan Anthropic-compatible endpoint (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL).

preferences.name: minimaxAnalysisModel
preferences.title: MiniMax Analysis Model
preferences.description: MiniMax model used for pronunciation analysis.

preferences.name: minimaxTtsBaseURL
preferences.title: MiniMax TTS Base URL
preferences.description: MiniMax TTS base URL.

preferences.name: minimaxTtsModel
preferences.title: MiniMax TTS Model
preferences.description: MiniMax TTS model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: minimaxTtsVoiceId
preferences.title: MiniMax TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice ID for MiniMax TTS.

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Google AI Studio key for Gemini analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: geminiAnalysisModel
preferences.title: Gemini Analysis Model
preferences.description: Gemini model used for pronunciation analysis.

preferences.name: geminiTtsModel
preferences.title: Gemini TTS Model
preferences.description: Gemini TTS model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: geminiTtsVoice
preferences.title: Gemini TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice for Gemini TTS.

preferences.name: mimoApiKey
preferences.title: MiMo (Xiaomi) API Key
preferences.description: Xiaomi MiMo key (tp-… for Token Plan, sk-… for pay-as-you-go). Used for MiMo analysis and TTS.

preferences.name: mimoBaseURL
preferences.title: MiMo Base URL
preferences.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Pay-as-you-go: https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1 (default). Token Plan: token-plan-{cn,sgp,ams}.xiaomimimo.com/v1 (see your 订阅管理 page).

preferences.name: mimoAnalysisModel
preferences.title: MiMo Analysis Model
preferences.description: MiMo chat model for analysis (thinking is disabled for speed/determinism).

preferences.name: mimoTtsModel
preferences.title: MiMo TTS Model
preferences.description: MiMo TTS model used for read-aloud.

preferences.name: mimoTtsVoice
preferences.title: MiMo TTS Voice
preferences.description: Voice for MiMo TTS (English voices).

preferences.name: ttsProvider
preferences.title: TTS Provider
preferences.description: Which provider synthesizes audio.

preferences.name: translationTargetLanguage
preferences.title: Translation Target
preferences.description: Target language for Translate actions. Auto translates Chinese to English and other text to Simplified Chinese.

preferences.name: sentencesPerPage
preferences.title: Sentences Per Page
preferences.description: How many sentences are shown and analyzed together for long passages.

preferences.name: loopCount
preferences.title: Shadowing Loop Count
preferences.description: How many times the Shadowing Loop repeats the sentence.

preferences.name: loopGap
preferences.title: Shadowing Loop Gap (seconds)
preferences.description: Pause between repeats in the Shadowing Loop.
